Levels.systole: B tones were presented during ventricular systole
Levels.diastole: B tones were presented during ventricular diastole

Levels.B: Identical to the B tones in the streaming task.

frequency.Description: Acoustic frequency of tone in Hz

Levels.systole: Participant thought tones were synchronized to their heartbeat
Levels.diastole: Participant thought tones were presented between heartbeats
